search.query: index=casb_gateway (action=dlp_block OR action=dlp_flagged OR action=egress_block OR action=egress_monitor OR action=intrusion_detected OR action=wazuh_alert_fired) | stats count(eval(severity="critical")) as crit_count, count(eval(severity="high")) as high_count, count(eval(severity="medium")) as med_count, count(eval(severity="low")) as low_count, latest(prompt_preview) as last_prompt, values(rule) as triggered_rules by user | eval risk_score = (crit_count * 100) + (high_count * 50) + (med_count * 25) + (low_count * 10) | eval risk_status = case( crit_count >= 1, "CRITICAL_BREACH", high_count >= 3, "HIGH_BEHAVIORAL_RISK", med_count >= 5, "MEDIUM_BEHAVIORAL_RISK", low_count >= 7, "LOW_BEHAVIORAL_RISK", 1=1, "NOMINAL" ) | where risk_status != "NOMINAL" | table user, risk_status, risk_score, crit_count, high_count, med_count, low_count, triggered_rules, last_prompt | sort - risk_score
